  • The Forge
  • The Craft
  • The Hearth

  • Commission

Where the heat of the anvil
meets the precision of the plate.

We craft heirloom high-carbon Damascus steel chef knives, exclusively available through our primal, open-fire dining experiences.

Commission Your Blade

Primal Origin

Every blade is born in the brutal heat of the forge, shaped by hand to achieve unparalleled structural integrity.

The Art of Metallurgy

We revere the traditional bladesmithing techniques. Our signature British high-carbon steel is folded, hardened, and tempered over weeks, creating a distinctive pattern that reflects its unique journey from raw iron to culinary instrument.

Explore Metallurgy

Hand-Forged Excellence

No two blades share the same carbon fingerprint. The folding patterns are an honest reflection of the artisan's strike.

Precision Edge

Optimised for the most demanding Michelin-starred environments, ensuring a microscopic, razor-sharp bevel that retains its edge.

Smoke & Sizzle

Your knife is not just a tool; it is the centrepiece of a micro-seasonal degustation menu. We prepare heirloom ingredients over native hardwood embers, carving each course with the very blade you have commissioned.

Technical Specifications

A rigorous commitment to transparency. Our blades are engineered for perfect balance and enduring sharpness.

Steel Composition
1095 / 15N20 High-Carbon
Rockwell Hardness
61-62 HRC
Handle Origin
Stabilised British Walnut Burl
Balance Point
10mm ahead of the bolster
Download Care Protocol

Bespoke Commissions

Due to the intensive artisanal constraints of our craft, we accept only four commissions per calendar month. This ensures each blade and subsequent dining experience receives uncompromising attention.

Where the heat of the anvil meets the precision of the plate.
